privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env debug_pallet_physics_jitter task by confirming that the task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world containing an unstable palletizer. Verified that the expected parameters (cfm: 0.005, erp: 0.4, linear/angular damping: 0.2, cardboard softCFM: 0.001) and output path (/home/ga/Desktop/stabilized_pallet.wbt) exactly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
